    1. update(double)

Interface Updatable

All Known Implementing Classes:
Bullet, ExplosiveBarrel, GameEntity, Landmine, Player, PowerUp, ShieldPowerUp, SpeedPowerUp, Trap
public interface Updatable
Defines an object that updates its state every frame.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    update(double deltaSeconds)
    Advances the object state by one frame.

  • Method Details

    • update

      void update(double deltaSeconds)
      Advances the object state by one frame.
      Parameters:
      deltaSeconds - elapsed time since the previous frame, in seconds
